info.name: Asana Goal Relationships API
info.description:
The Asana Goal Relationships API allows users to create and manage relationships between goals and other goals, projects, tasks, or portfolios.

Contact Support:
 Name: Asana Support

request.description: Returns the complete updated goal relationship record for a single goal relationship.

response.name: Successfully retrieved the record for a goal relationship.
